name: Cranberry Poppy Seed Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Egg Beaters (or other egg substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease bottom of an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, poppy seed and baking powder.
3. Blend milk, margarine, egg substitute, vanilla and lemon peel; stir into flour mixture just until moistened.
4. Stir in cranberries; spread in prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 60-70 minutes or until done.
6. Cool. Drizzle with glaze if desired. Makes 12 servings.
